working_on.task: Fix TTS Resume Logic (Restarting from zero bug)

pending_tasks.task: 🟢 LOW: Fix final flaky assertion in PythonUpdateCheckerTest (Singleton conflict)
🟢 LOW: Add Strict VideoID Regex validation before passing to backend
Future: Migrate off Chaquopy to drop 2.5s overhead

recent_changes.description: Fixed TTS Resume logic where it would restart from the beginning. Implemented totalSpokenLength tracking in TtsManager to allow absolute position resumption.
Fixed TTS Pause/Resume sync issues and race condition in TtsManager using AtomicInteger counter.

errors_encountered.error: TTS Resume starts from beginning instead of paused position
errors_encountered.solution: Implemented totalSpokenLength to accumulate finished chunks and a pause() method to capture exact absolute index.

decisions_made.decision: Track cumulative spoken length in TtsManager
decisions_made.reason: Necessary because currentIndex is relative to each chunk in QUEUE_ADD mode.

decisions_made.decision: Explicit pause() method instead of generic stop()
decisions_made.reason: Distinguishes between temporary pause (captures state) and hard stop (resets everything).
